scripts.dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev:apps
scripts.dev:apps: npm run dev --workspace=apps/shell & npm run dev --workspace=apps/market-overview & npm run dev --workspace=apps/watchlist & npm run dev --workspace=apps/asset-details & npm run dev --workspace=apps/trade-stream & npm run dev --workspace=apps/alerts
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps && npm run build:server
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace=packages/utils && npm run build --workspace=packages/state && npm run build --workspace=packages/market-client && npm run build --workspace=packages/ui
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace=apps/market-overview && npm run build --workspace=apps/watchlist && npm run build --workspace=apps/asset-details && npm run build --workspace=apps/trade-stream && npm run build --workspace=apps/alerts && npm run build --workspace=apps/shell
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p apps/shell/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/market-overview/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/watchlist/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/asset-details/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/trade-stream/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/alerts/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p server/market-simulator/tsconfig.json
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules packages/*/dist apps/*/dist server/*/dist coverage
